title: citrus × keraji
intro: Citrus × keraji, also known as the Kumquat or Meiwa Kumquat, is a small, edible citrus fruit that belongs to the Rutaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. The health benefits of Citrus × keraji include its ability to support cardiovascular health, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in culinary dishes, including jams, marmalades, and desserts.
